steps.name: When  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
And  I enter credentials for 'LYRASIS Reads' account
And  I search 'available' book of distributor 'Biblioboard' and bookType 'EBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  I switch to 'eBooks' catalog tab
And  Open EBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click GET action button on book details screen
Then  I check that book contains READ action button on book details screen
steps.statusMessage: Button 'Read' is not present on book details screen. Error (if present) -
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Button 'Read' is not present on book details screen. Error (if present) - 
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.BookDetailsSteps.checkThatBookContainsActionButton(BookDetailsSteps.java:113)
	at ✽.I check that book contains READ action button on book details screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/Distributors.feature:37)

steps.name: When  Click RETURN action button on book details screen
Then  I check that book contains GET action button on book details screen
When  Click GET action button on book details screen
Then  I check that book contains READ action button on book details screen
When  Click READ action button on book details screen
Then  Book 'bookInfo' with EBOOK type is present on epub or pdf or audiobook screen
